findings.title: Privileged Entra ID account without MFA
findings.description: Cloud Global Admin is privileged but MFA is not enabled.
findings.remediation: Require phishing-resistant MFA for privileged identities.

findings.title: Kerberoastable AD account
findings.remediation: Use gMSA/managed service accounts and remove unnecessary SPNs.

findings.title: Guest identity has privileged access
findings.description: Guest user External Security Partner is privileged.
findings.remediation: Remove privileged roles from guest accounts unless explicitly approved.

findings.title: Application has high-risk Entra permissions
findings.description: Role Sync App has high-impact application permissions.
findings.remediation: Apply least privilege and require admin consent review for high-risk permissions.

findings.title: Stale privileged identity
findings.description: Legacy Domain Admin is privileged and has not signed in for 180 days.
findings.remediation: Review whether the account still needs privileged access.

findings.title: Stale privileged identity
findings.description: Dormant Privileged Role Holder is privileged and has not signed in for 91 days.
findings.remediation: Review whether the account still needs privileged access.

findings.title: Password never expires
findings.description: Legacy Domain Admin has password_never_expires enabled.
findings.remediation: Review password policy and migrate service use cases to managed identities.

findings.title: Password never expires
findings.remediation: Review password policy and migrate service use cases to managed identities.

findings.title: Kerberoastable AD account
findings.remediation: Use gMSA/managed service accounts and remove unnecessary SPNs.

findings.title: Application has high-risk Entra permissions
findings.description: HR Automation App has high-impact application permissions.
findings.remediation: Apply least privilege and require admin consent review for high-risk permissions.

findings.title: No enabled tenant-wide MFA Conditional Access policy
findings.description: No enabled Conditional Access policy requires MFA for all users.
evidence: Require MFA for admins: state=enabled, requires_mfa=True, includes_all_users=False
Legacy pilot policy: state=disabled, requires_mfa=True, includes_all_users=True
findings.remediation: Create or enable a Conditional Access policy requiring MFA for all users with approved exclusions.

findings.title: Non-privileged identity has path to privileged object
findings.description: Identity ad-u-103 can reach privileged target ad-g-101.
findings.remediation: Review group nesting, app ownership and high-risk app permissions.

findings.title: Non-privileged identity has path to privileged object
findings.description: Identity entra-u-202 can reach privileged target Directory.ReadWrite.All.
findings.remediation: Review group nesting, app ownership and high-risk app permissions.

findings.title: Non-privileged identity has path to privileged object
findings.description: Identity entra-u-202 can reach privileged target RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory.
findings.remediation: Review group nesting, app ownership and high-risk app permissions.

findings.title: Disabled privileged account still assigned privilege
findings.description: Legacy Domain Admin is disabled but still marked as privileged.
findings.remediation: Remove privileged assignments from disabled accounts.

findings.title: Password never expires
findings.remediation: Review password policy and migrate service use cases to managed identities.

findings.title: Stale application secret
findings.description: HR Automation App has a secret aged 240 days.
findings.remediation: Rotate secrets and prefer certificate or workload identity federation where possible.
